full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding how the LCGMM E-step differs from standard GMM E-step.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: In the LCGMM paper (AAAI 2010), does the E-step differ from standard GMM?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that the E-step is identical to standard GMM (Eq. 7 uses Bayes formula unchanged).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I read Section 'Model Fitting with EM' and confirmed the E-step formula is unchanged.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Clarifying the role of the KL regulariser in the M-step update equations.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: In LCGMM Eq.(13), what is the intuition behind the second correction term subtracted from the standard GMM mean update?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped articulate that the correction term adjusts the cluster mean to be more consistent with nearby points in the kNN graph.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified by tracing the derivation from Eq.(11) to Eq.(13) in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Checking the step-by-step structure of the full LCGMM algorithm for the notebook.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: List the steps of the LCGMM algorithm from input to final cluster labels, referencing equations.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a structure skeleton that I then rewrote in my own words and corrected with paper-specific equation references.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Rewrote all steps independently and verified each equation reference against the paper.
